_metadata.notes: Win % = granted OR partial. Grant % = full grant outright. +IMO subset = private IMO present.
_metadata.consumer_contract: Iterate ONLY json['pairs'] (skip '_metadata'). For each pair, imo_win_pct and imo_grant_pct are NULL when imo_n == 0; consumers MUST null-check or guard on imo_n >= 5 before quoting % values. Use the 'tier' field to gate display: 'high' (N>=50) is reliable, 'moderate' (N>=15) is suggestive, 'low' (N>=5) is anecdotal — quote 'tier=low' pairs with explicit small-sample caveat or skip entirely.
